calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Jun-28-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Continued To Feb-22-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 27, 2015 in Department 525:
Maria Adela Lainez, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona. Court Assigned Spanish interpreter Marta Riesem (#30052) for Ms. Lainez is present.
James J. Murphy, Esq. (415-731-9800), specially appearance counsel for Appellant/Defendant Saul Padilla who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Maria Adela Lainez testifies through Court interpreter Ms. Riesem and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit Not Marked - various documents.

Mr. Murphy cross examines Ms. Lainez on behalf of appellant Mr Padilla.
Mr. Murphy examines Mr. Padilla.

Mr. Murphy testifies on behalf of appellant, Mr. Padilla and Mr. Padilla responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit Not Marked - copy of the opening brief, various pictures.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly exhibits returned by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Judgment Entered
